entries.title: OpenAI updates its Agents SDK to help enterprises build safer, more capable agents
entries.description: OpenAI has expanded the capabilities of its agent-building toolkit, as agentic AI continues to grow in popularity.

entries.title: Factory hits $1.5B valuation to build AI coding for enterprises
entries.description: The three-year-old startup raised $150 million led by Khosla Ventures.

entries.title: Luma launches AI-powered production studio with faith-focused Wonder Project
entries.description: The studio's first project will be about Moses and star Academy Award-winner Ben Kingsley, to be released this spring on Prime Video.

entries.title: Upscale AI in talks to raise at $2B valuation, says report
entries.description: AI infrastructure company Upscale AI is reportedly in talks to raise its third funding round since launching just seven months ago.

entries.title: Physical Intelligence, a hot robotics startup, says its new robot brain can figure out tasks it was never taught
entries.description: The new model, called π0.7, represents what the company describes as an early but meaningful step toward the long-sought goal of a general-purpose robot brain.

entries.title: OpenAI takes aim at Anthropic with beefed-up Codex that gives it more power over your desktop
entries.description: OpenAI's agentic coding tool has gotten a major makeover, with a variety of new powers and abilities.

entries.title: Anthropic CPO leaves Figma’s board after reports he will offer a competing product

entries.title: Google now lets you explore the web side-by-side with AI Mode
entries.description: Now, when you're using AI Mode on Chrome desktop, clicking a link will open the web page side-by-side with AI Mode.

entries.title: InsightFinder raises $15M to help companies figure out where AI agents go wrong

entries.title: AI traffic to US retailers rose 393% in Q1, and it’s boosting their revenue too
entries.description: Adobe says AI traffic to U.S. retail sites also jumped 269% in March, with visitors converting better and generating more revenue than non-AI shoppers.

entries.title: Roblox’s AI assistant gets new agentic tools to plan, build, and test games
entries.description: The new tools are designed to help creators throughout the entire development process.

entries.title: Google is now targeting bad ads over bad actors
entries.description: Google blocked 8.3 billion ads in 2025 but suspended fewer advertisers.

entries.title: Runway CEO says AI could help Hollywood make 50 films instead of one $100M blockbuster
entries.description: Runway’s CEO says AI could help studios make dozens of films for the cost of one, betting volume will boost hit-making odds.

entries.title: Meta raises Quest 3 and Quest 3S prices due to RAM shortage
entries.description: Starting April 19, the price of the Meta Quest 3S (128GB) and Meta Quest 3S (256GB) will go up by $50 to $349.99 and $449.99, respectively. The price of the Meta Quest 3 is going up by $100 to $599.99

entries.title: Canva’s AI assistant can now call various tools to make designs for you
entries.description: The latest version of Canva's AI assistant lets users create editable designs with text prompts.

entries.title: This simulation startup wants to be the Cursor for physical AI
entries.description: Antioch raised an $8.5 million seed round to create simulation tools for a new generation of robot builders.

entries.title: DeepL, known for text translation, now wants to translate your voice
entries.description: DeepL says its tech could be used for real-time translation with meeting tools like Zoom and Microsoft Teams.

entries.title: Tokenmaxxing, OpenAI’s shopping spree, and the AI Anxiety Gap
